overview: Sree Rama Engineering College (SREC), Tirupati, focuses on industry-oriented technical education with placement training programs designed for IT services and regional industrial sectors.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Convenor Quota (Category A): ₹31,000 per year. Management Quota (Category B): ₹95,000 per year.

placements.companiesVisited: ZOHO, Accenture, TCS, Global Logic, IBM, HCL, Tech Mahindra

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on AP state counseling and management quota procedures.

campus.specialNote: Hostel & Mess combined fee ranges from ₹45,000 – ₹55,000 annually.

contact.address: Rami Reddy Nagar, Karakambadi Road,Mangalam (B.O), Tirupathi – 517 507.

hostel.note: Hostel and mess combined fee for basic shared accommodation.

scholarships.name: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD)
scholarships.description: AP state tuition support for eligible reservation and EBC category students.

scholarships.name: Post-Metric Schemes
scholarships.description: State welfare department support for eligible SC, ST, and BC students.
